verses.text: David in ama-a' dingin David khuapi sungah innte a lam hi. Amah in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang-a' dingin mun khat bawlin puanbuk khat lamsak hi

Tua ciangin David in, “ Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua ding leh ama na a sem tawntung dingin Topa in amaute teel ahih manin Levi mite simloh kuamah in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang pua theilo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in a bawlsa, ama omna ding munah Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a paipihto dingin David in Jerusalem-ah Israel mi khempeuh a khawm hi
David in Aaron' suante leh Levi mi a khopte
Kohath-te beh sung panin a ukpi Uriel, a behte za leh sawmnih tawh ahi hi
Merari-te beh sung panin a ukpi Asaiah, a behte za nih leh sawmnih tawh ahi hi
Gershom-te beh sung panin a ukpi Joel, a behte za leh sawmthum tawh ahi hi
Elizafan-te beh sung panin a ukpi Shemaiah, a behte za nih tawh ahi hi
Hebron-te beh sung panin a ukpi Eliel, a behte sawmgiat tawh ahi hi
Uzziel-te beh sung panin a ukpi Amminadab, a behte za leh sawmlenih tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin David in siampite Zadok leh Abiathar, leh Levi mite Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel, leh Amminadab samin

amaute kiangah, “Note pen Levi mite beh lutangte na hi uh hi. Ama-a' dingin ka bawlsakna munah Israel Pasian, Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang na paipihtoh theihna dingun note leh na Levi mipihte uh nomau mah kisian'suah tawm un
A masa lai-in note na om kei uh a, a kisehsa bang danin kemlo ihih manin eite tungah Topa i Pasian hong hehin gim hong pia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian, Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a paipihto dingin siampite leh Levi mite amau mah kisian'suah tawm uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' kamgenna tawh kizui-in Moses' thupiak bangin Levi mite in a liangko uhah a zawlte tawh Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua uh hi
Lungdamna aw gin'sakna dingin lasakna nate, harp lasakna leh laia lasaknate leh a daltuahte nakpi takin tumin la a sa dingin Levi ukpite in a mipihte uh a sehna ding David in thu a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in Joel' tapa Heman seh uh hi. Tua ciangin a beh sung panin Berekhiah' tapa Asaf, Merari minam sung panin a behte uh Kushaiah' tapa Ethan

tua ciangin amaute tawh a pawl nihna-in a behte uh Zekhariah, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattithiah, Elifelehu, leh Mikneiah, leh kongcingte Obededom leh Jeiel seh uh hi
Lasate Heman, Asaf, leh Ethan-te in sumngo daltuahte a tum ding uh ahi hi
Zekhariah, Aziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah, leh Benaiah-te in a paisuak aw-in harp lasaknate a tum ding uh ahi hi
Mattithiah, Elifelehu, Mikneiah, Obededom, Jeiel, leh Azaziah-te in laia lasaknate a un aw-in a makai ding uh ahi hi
Levi mite sungah la makai Khenaniah in la uk ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thei hi
Berekhiah leh Elkanah-te pen Thuciamna Singkuang-a' dingin kongcingte hi ding uh hi

Siampite Shebaniah, Joshafat, Nethanel, Amasai, Zekhariah, Benaiah, leh Eliezer-te in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Obededom leh Jehiah-te zong Thuciamna Singkuang-a' dingin kongcingte hi ding uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin David leh Israel upate, leh a tula a ukte, Obededom' inn panin lungdamna tawh Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a paipihto dingin a pai uh hi
Pasian in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite huh ahih manin amaute in bawngtal sagih leh tuutal sagih biakna-in a pia uh hi

David in saihadial puantualpi silh a, tua mah bangin Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite khempeuh, leh lasate, leh lasate a uk Khenaniah-te in zong a silh uh hi. Tua ciangin David in siampipuan khat silh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh in sakite leh peengkulte, leh daltuahte' awging tawh kizui-in awng kawmin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto uh a, harp lasaknate leh laia lasaknate tawh nakpi takin la a sa uh hi

David khuapi-ah Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang hong tun' laitakin Saul' tanu a zi Mikhal in tawlet panin na en a, Kumpi David lamin a gualnuam-a a om a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a lungsim sungah David a neu-et hi.
